hints: Timer not started when the unacked buffer becomes non-empty.
Timer not restarted after a partial ACK that leaves segments outstanding.
Retransmit uses next_seq instead of window_base as the seq to resend.

ack_loss.summary: Tests cumulative ACK absorption of dropped ACKs.
hints: Sender re-retransmits on ACK loss instead of waiting for the next ACK.
Cumulative ACK retires more than one segment; check your loop bound.
ACK number interpreted as 'last received' instead of 'next expected'.

sack.summary: Tests SACK block generation on out-of-order receive and selective retransmission by sender.
hints: Receiver generates cumulative ACK but no SACK blocks for out-of-order bytes.
SACK blocks are sent but sender ignores them and retransmits everything.
SACK block ranges off-by-one (half-open [start, end) vs closed [start, end]).

corruption.summary: Tests that checksum-failed packets are treated as drops.
hints: is_corrupt returns True but the packet is still processed.
Corrupted DATA packets generate an ACK instead of being silently dropped.
Corrupted ACK packets advance window_base (should not — drop silently).

handshake_loss.summary: Tests handshake retry when SYN or SYN_ACK is dropped.
hints: No timer started for the SYN; handshake stalls on loss.
SYN_ACK retransmitted with a new ISN instead of reusing the original.
Server transitions past SYN_RECEIVED on a duplicate SYN instead of resending SYN_ACK.

teardown_edge.summary: Tests FIN teardown, including loss and simultaneous close.
hints: FIN_ACK not sent after receiving a FIN.
Connection state does not transition to CLOSED after both halves FIN.
Simultaneous close handled as one-sided (one endpoint still in FIN_WAIT).

handshake.summary: Tests 3-way handshake completion under ideal conditions (Bundle 2).
hints: Client never transitions SYN_SENT to ESTABLISHED — check ack_num validation on SYN_ACK.
Server never transitions SYN_RECEIVED to ESTABLISHED — check the final ACK handler.
Either side's next_seq not advanced to isn+1 after handshake completes.

data_transfer.summary: Tests data transfer on a clean channel (Bundle 2).
hints: Receiver's peer_ack_num not advanced by len(payload) on in-order DATA.
Sender's window_base not advanced on cumulative ACK — check the retirement loop.
Multi-segment sends only transmit the first segment — check _try_send_from_queue loop.
bytes_acked or bytes_delivered counters not being incremented at all.

teardown.summary: Tests FIN teardown (Bundle 2, unilateral close on a clean channel).
hints: FIN_ACK sent but state not transitioned to CLOSED.
Sender of FIN does not start the retransmit timer (breaks Bundle 3 FIN-loss scenarios).
FIN processed in ESTABLISHED but not in other states where it's also valid.
